title: rubus egregius
intro: Rubus egregius, also known as the Yellow Raspberry or Yellow Raspberry Bramble, is a species of thorny shrub belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus egregius include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to address various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
